verdict_reasoning: LYN is a Src-family tyrosine kinase anchored to the inner leaflet of the plasma membrane via N-terminal myristoylation and palmitoylation. Canonically it is inner-leaflet-anchored (cytoplasmic face). However, multiple studies document LYN ecto-display on the outer leaflet of cancer cells (ecto-kinase phenomenon), placing it in the cell_state_induced / cancer ecto-kinase category. This documented outer-leaflet pool in tumor cells — even though baseline localization is inner-leaflet — qualifies it as contextual rather than no.
